title: Tom’s Dream
description: Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Franky, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam, Kokoro. Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Then I couldn't have cared less.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: That's why I'm stopping you, kid.

summary: Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.
